TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bwarung, title = bwarung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bwarung} }

S.FORM: alang bwarung ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 272 buwan, 870 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 735 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 135 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 75%, Tayan 6%, Bunun 3%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bwarung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na bwarung hya' ga toda. tay 'zil na bwarung hya' ga snuwing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang bwarung ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 272 buwan, 870 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 735 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 135 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 75%, Tayan 6%, Bunun 3%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na bwarung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bwarung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na bwarung hya' ga toda. tay 'zil na bwarung hya' ga snuwing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βwaruŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa to*a. taj ʔzil na βwaruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
